/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -W -Wpointer-arith -Wcast-qual -Wno-unused-parameter -Wcast-align -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/fluidsynth.dir/fluidsynth.c.o CMakeFiles/fluidsynth.dir/utils/fluid_file.cpp.o -o fluidsynth  libfluidsynth.a -Wl,-framework,CoreAudio,-framework,AudioUnit -lm
